languages.text: "Чтобы понять, как немочи связаны с происходящими в местной биоте феноменами, единственный достоверный способ — произвести вскрытие нескольких особей. Досконально изучить их мозг, документируя каждый шаг, и постичь, какое влияние на них оказывает аномалия. Подобные практики приблизят нас к истине и пониманию истинной природы Януса".

"To learn how the retches are connected to the phenomena occurring in the local biota, the only reliable method is to perform dissections on several specimens. To examine their brains in exhaustive detail, documenting every step, and to comprehend the effect the anomaly has on them. Such investigations shall bring us closer to the truth and to an understanding of Janus's true nature."
languages.original_text: "Чтобы понять, как немочи связаны с происходящими в местной биоте феноменами, единственный достоверный способ — произвести вскрытие нескольких особей. Досконально изучить их мозг, документируя каждый шаг, и постичь, какое влияние на них оказывает аномалия. Подобные практики приблизят нас к истине и пониманию истинной природы Януса".

traits.locale_text: "To understand how the retches are connected to the phenomena occurring in the local biota, the only reliable method is to perform autopsies upon several specimens. To examine their brains in exhaustive detail, documenting every step, and to comprehend the influence the anomaly exerts upon them. Such practices shall bring us closer to the truth and to an understanding of Janus's true nature."

languages.text: "Um herauszufinden, wie die Speier mit dem Phänomen der örtlichen Biota zusammenhängen, müssen wir mehrere Spezies sezieren, das ist die einzig verlässliche Methode. Wir müssen die Gehirne eingehend untersuchen, jeden Schritt dokumentieren und die Effekte der Anomalie auf sie vergleichen. Derartige Untersuchungen bringen uns der Wahrheit und dem Verständnis der wahren Natur von Janus näher."
languages.original_text: "To learn how the retches are connected to the phenomena occurring in the local biota, the only reliable method is to perform dissections on several specimens. Such investigations shall bring us closer to the truth and to an understanding of Janus's true nature."

Derartige Untersuchungen bringen uns der Wahrheit und dem Verständnis der wahren Natur von Janus näher."

languages.text: « Si nous voulons savoir comment les infâmes sont liés aux phénomènes se produisant dans la biologie locale, la seule méthode fiable consiste à procéder à la dissection de plusieurs spécimens. Nous pourrons ainsi examiner leurs cerveaux dans leurs moindres détails, documenter chaque étape et comprendre l'effet que l'anomalie a sur eux. De telles recherches nous permettront d'approcher de la vérité et de comprendre la véritable nature de Janus. »
languages.original_text: "To learn how the retches are connected to the phenomena occurring in the local biota, the only reliable method is to perform dissections on several specimens. To examine their brains in exhaustive detail, documenting every step, and to comprehend the effect the anomaly has on them. Such investigations shall bring us closer to the truth and to an understanding of Janus's true nature."

traits.locale_text: « Si nous voulons savoir comment les infâmes sont liés aux phénomènes se produisant dans la biologie locale, la seule méthode fiable consiste à procéder à la dissection de plusieurs spécimens. Nous pourrons ainsi examiner leurs cerveaux dans leurs moindres détails, documenter chaque étape et comprendre l'effet que l'anomalie a sur eux. De telles recherches nous permettront d'approcher de la vérité et de comprendre la véritable nature de Janus. »

languages.text: «Para descubrir la vinculación de los degenerados con los fenómenos que ocurren en la biota local, el único método fiable es la disección de varios especímenes: examinar sus cerebros de forma exhaustiva, documentando cada paso y comprender el efecto que la anomalía ejerce sobre ellos. Estas investigaciones nos acercarán a la verdad y nos ayudarán a entender la verdadera naturaleza de Janus».
languages.original_text: "To learn how the retches are connected to the phenomena occurring in the local biota, the only reliable method is to perform dissections on several specimens. To examine their brains in exhaustive detail, documenting every step, and to comprehend the effect the anomaly has on them. Such investigations shall bring us closer to the truth and to an understanding of Janus's true nature."

traits.locale_text: «Para descubrir la vinculación de los degenerados con los fenómenos que ocurren en la biota local, el único método fiable es la disección de varios especímenes: examinar sus cerebros de forma exhaustiva, documentando cada paso y comprender el efecto que la anomalía ejerce sobre ellos. Estas investigaciones nos acercarán a la verdad y nos ayudarán a entender la verdadera naturaleza de Janus».

languages.text: "Leşlerin yerel biyotada meydana gelen olaylarla bağlantısını öğrenmek için tek güvenilir yöntem, birkaç numune üzerinde diseksiyon yapmak. Beyinlerini tüm detaylarıyla incelemek, her adımı belgelemek ve anomalinin üzerlerindeki etkisini anlamak... Bu tür araştırmalar bizi hakikate ve Janus'un gerçek doğasını anlamaya bir adım daha yaklaştıracaktır."
languages.original_text: "To learn how the retches are connected to the phenomena occurring in the local biota, the only reliable method is to perform dissections on several specimens. To examine their brains in exhaustive detail, documenting every step, and to comprehend the effect the anomaly has on them. Such investigations shall bring us closer to the truth and to an understanding of Janus's true nature."

traits.locale_text: "Leşlerin yerel biyotada meydana gelen olaylarla bağlantısını öğrenmek için tek güvenilir yöntem, birkaç numune üzerinde diseksiyon yapmak. Beyinlerini tüm detaylarıyla incelemek, her adımı belgelemek ve anomalinin üzerlerindeki etkisini anlamak... Bu tür araştırmalar bizi hakikate ve Janus'un gerçek doğasını anlamaya bir adım daha yaklaştıracaktır."

languages.text: “要弄清楚这些恶种与当地生物群落异变之间的联系，唯一可靠的方法就是对数个标本进行解剖。详尽地检查它们的大脑，记录每一个步骤，弄清楚异常现象对它们的影响。这样的调查将使我们更接近真相，也更能理解加努斯的真实本质。”
languages.original_text: "To learn how the retches are connected to the phenomena occurring in the local biota, the only reliable method is to perform dissections on several specimens.
